_about: Documented code patches applied to the code binary (everything that is not translated data): render-path detours and their cave bodies, decoder hooks for the briefing system, and two gameplay tweaks. The builder asserts old_hex before writing new_hex. The autoload/font relocation words (module params, font pointer, heap floor) are computed by utils/arm9_layout.py, not listed here.

entries.why: 12px glyphs overflow the 10-tile-per-row name field of the 8px UI; the copy helper is detoured to a cave that clamps the tile-row budget so a wide name cannot alias the neighbouring name's tiles (ghost fragments).
carried-unit names longer than the 6-cell squad field left stale glyph cells behind; detour blanks the cells beyond the field width.
the shared glyph rasterizer is detoured to a cave that clips tile writes past the list-row stride for the management list background only, removing a text occluder band next to wide 12px rows.

the fixed 8x16 UI font has no CJK glyphs; the glyph-blit start is detoured to a trampoline that renders glyph slots >= 2196 from the relocated 12x12 atlas with a 12px advance, making every 8x16-font surface CJK-capable.

multi-line 12px caption lines end past the 80px strip the 8px engine allocates; the cell-pad loop is stopped at the strip boundary so captions keep the original tile budget (no ghost echo right of the box).

mission-briefing records carry inline pointers to full-length text in the briefing blob bank; the decoder entry is detoured to resolve those pointers (and lift the glyph cap) when the source lies in the briefing region.
companion to the entry hook: restores the decoder's cursor to the briefing record end so the interactive briefing viewer walks records correctly.
second detour of the BG tile-copy helper (info-panel context) into the clamp cave; same over-advance fix as 0x12C4A for another copy path.
the engine-A copy helper gets the same row-budget clamp via its own cave, removing stray glyph fragments above the info boxes.
menu text styles use a 3-colour LUT that maps 2bpp ink value 3 to transparent; CJK glyphs are drawn with ink 3 only, so menus rendered them blank. Detour patches LUT[3]=LUT[2] for such styles.
one store in the OBJ-text plotter wrote the wrong register, keeping ink-value-3 pixels transparent on the aptitude labels; storing r1 renders them.
the speaker-nameplate descriptor init only set style bit 1; setting bits 0+1 routes nameplates through the 12x12 glyph path so CJK speaker names render.

the nameplate was switched to the 12x12 dialogue font but kept the original top anchor; moving only this plate's penY down 3px aligns its glyph baseline with the 16px UI line box without changing dialogue-body text.
gameplay tweak: every stage transition gated on a free-battle (recon) count required 3-4 battles; each `cmp rN,#count ; bne` becomes `cmp rN,#1 ; blo` so a single free battle unlocks the next stage.

the unit/character list detail panel is an empty template until a unit is inspected; the detour populates the highlighted entry's panel while browsing.
companion detour that refreshes the portrait/detail state when the roster cursor moves, so the auto-populated panel tracks navigation.

the battle-bark formatter consumed the high byte of a 2-byte glyph token after a 00 control marker (reading it as a control type), garbling the line; veneer to a cave that re-reads it as a normal token.
the ability learn-level getter is rebuilt to call a bounds-check helper cave so out-of-range learn slots cannot index past the table.

code cave in the dead in-image 12x12 atlas (the live atlas is relocated to RAM): renders glyph slots >= 2196 from the relocated atlas and advances the pen 12px; called from the 8x16 blit injection at 0x131D8. The atlas call is routed through a penY wrapper (cave tail +0xAC) that draws 12x12 glyphs at ctx.penY+3 and restores penY after: renderB ink sits on rows 2..14 of the 16px line box while the 12x12 cell inks rows 0..11, so an unbiased blit floats 3px above the renderB baseline (user-visible on every trampoline list row); +3 bottom-aligns ink (11+3=14) and cannot clip (14 < 16). renderA/stage surfaces are unaffected (their 0x2013108 call at 0x1323E is not detoured).
row-budget clamp body for the engine-A copy helper (called from 0x1359A), gated on the info-box context.

cave bodies for the 0x132E2/0x1330E hooks: detect a briefing-region source, load the inline blob pointer, clear the glyph cap, and restore the record cursor on return (shared state word lives just below the cave).
clamps the learn-level list index for the rebuilt getter at 0x98DCA.
re-dispatches control type 6 and un-consumes a >= 0xE0 token high byte for the bark formatter veneer at 0x6588E.
early-returns the rasterizer write when the destination tile column exceeds the row stride, only for the management-list background context.
stops the 8px pad-cell loop at the 80px caption strip boundary (caption compose context only); every other context falls through byte-identical.
cave body for 0x4A66A: edge-detects cursor movement and re-arms the detail/portrait populate state.
overflow helpers for the 12x12-on-8x16 trampoline (special-cases a few slots and jumps back into the trampoline body).

the row-budget clamp body (called from 0x12C4A, gated on the affinity/list contexts) plus the roster browse auto-populate body (called from 0x4A340: draws the browse template and edge-calls the inspect routine).
clamp body for the second copy-path detour at 0x134AE (info-panel row budget).
clears glyph cells beyond the 6-cell squad name field (called from 0x12CCC); also covers the carried-unit name rows.
if the text style's LUT[3] is transparent, copy LUT[2] into it, then replay the clobbered instructions (called from 0x13C06).
